types.description: Profile node. Holds callsite information, execution statistics and child nodes.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique id of the node.

properties.name: callFrame
properties.description: Function location.

properties.name: hitCount
properties.description: Number of samples where this node was on top of the call stack.

properties.name: children
properties.description: Child node ids.

properties.name: deoptReason
properties.description:
The reason of being not optimized. The function may be deoptimized or marked as don't
optimize.

properties.name: positionTicks
properties.description: An array of source position ticks.

properties.name: nodes
properties.description: The list of profile nodes. First item is the root node.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description: Profiling start timestamp in microseconds.

properties.name: endTime
properties.description: Profiling end timestamp in microseconds.

properties.name: samples
properties.description: Ids of samples top nodes.

properties.name: timeDeltas
properties.description:
Time intervals between adjacent samples in microseconds. The first delta is relative to the
profile startTime.

types.description: Specifies a number of samples attributed to a certain source position.

properties.name: line
properties.description: Source line number (1-based).

properties.name: ticks
properties.description: Number of samples attributed to the source line.

types.description: Coverage data for a source range.

properties.name: startOffset
properties.description: JavaScript script source offset for the range start.

properties.name: endOffset
properties.description: JavaScript script source offset for the range end.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Collected execution count of the source range.

types.description: Coverage data for a JavaScript function.

properties.name: functionName
properties.description: JavaScript function name.

properties.name: ranges
properties.description: Source ranges inside the function with coverage data.

properties.name: isBlockCoverage
properties.description: Whether coverage data for this function has block granularity.

types.description: Coverage data for a JavaScript script.

properties.name: scriptId
properties.description: JavaScript script id.

properties.name: url
properties.description: JavaScript script name or url.

properties.name: functions
properties.description: Functions contained in the script that has coverage data.

commands.name: getBestEffortCoverage
commands.description:
Collect coverage data for the current isolate. The coverage data may be incomplete due to
garbage collection.

returns.name: result
returns.description: Coverage data for the current isolate.

commands.name: setSamplingInterval
commands.description: Changes CPU profiler sampling interval. Must be called before CPU profiles recording started.

commands.name: startPreciseCoverage
commands.description:
Enable precise code coverage. Coverage data for JavaScript executed before enabling precise code
coverage may be incomplete. Enabling prevents running optimized code and resets execution
counters.

parameters.name: callCount
parameters.description: Collect accurate call counts beyond simple 'covered' or 'not covered'.

parameters.name: allowTriggeredUpdates
parameters.description: Allow the backend to send updates on its own initiative

returns.name: timestamp
returns.description: Monotonically increasing time (in seconds) when the coverage update was taken in the backend.

commands.name: stopPreciseCoverage
commands.description:
Disable precise code coverage. Disabling releases unnecessary execution count records and allows
executing optimized code.

commands.name: takePreciseCoverage
commands.description:
Collect coverage data for the current isolate, and resets execution counters. Precise code
coverage needs to have started.

returns.name: result
returns.description: Coverage data for the current isolate.

returns.name: timestamp
returns.description: Monotonically increasing time (in seconds) when the coverage update was taken in the backend.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Profile title passed as an argument to console.profile().

events.name: consoleProfileStarted
events.description: Sent when new profile recording is started using console.profile() call.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Profile title passed as an argument to console.profile().

events.name: preciseCoverageDeltaUpdate
events.description:
Reports coverage delta since the last poll (either from an event like this, or from
`takePreciseCoverage` for the current isolate. May only be sent if precise code
coverage has been started. This event can be trigged by the embedder to, for example,
trigger collection of coverage data immediately at a certain point in time.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Monotonically increasing time (in seconds) when the coverage update was taken in the backend.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Coverage data for the current isolate.
